subject: refactor(theme): centralize theme colors into shared constants file
body:
Previously theme colors (#0a0a0a, #d4d4d4) were hardcoded in three
separate files (index.html, vite.config.ts, index.css), causing them
to drift when the theme changed. Now src/constants/theme.ts is the
single source of truth — vite.config.ts imports directly, and a custom
Vite plugin (themeColorInjector) replaces %THEME_*% placeholders in
index.html at build time via transformIndexHtml.

Tags: infrastructure, pwa, theme, build
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-centralization
Semver: patch
